message: fix: move main.rs back to root, configure bin name 'cass' in Cargo.toml

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
 license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
 resolver = "2"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search"
+default-run = "cass"
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow = "*"
@@ -53,6 +54,10 @@ tempfile = "*"
 insta = { version = "*", features = ["yaml", "json"] }
 criterion = "*"
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "cass"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
 [profile.release]
 lto = true
 codegen-units = 1
